---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for safe-delete
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

A clear and concise description of what problem this feature would solve.
Example: "I'm always worried when my agent refactors large projects that it will delete something important..."

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Impact

- How many users would this help? [e.g. all, advanced users, specific workflow]
- Does this change default behaviour?
- Is this backward-compatible?

## Platform

Does this affect:
- [ ] Windows
- [ ] macOS
- [ ] Linux
- [ ] All platforms

## Additional Context

Add any other context or mockups about the feature request here.
